title: Affiliate Marketing Specialist (E-Commerce/Fashion)
description:
• Take ownership of day-to-day partner channel execution, including payout logic, content updates, coordination with external partners, and administration of commercial arrangements.
  • Expand the partner ecosystem by sourcing and onboarding suitable collaborators from overseas online retail markets, particularly within apparel, occasion wear, and consumer content spaces.
  • Develop and deploy targeted partner initiatives tied to demand cycles and key commercial periods to improve transaction volume and conversion outcomes.
  • Manage ongoing partner engagement to increase participation levels, ensure consistent brand representation, and strengthen long-term collaboration value.
  • Review sales contribution and traffic behaviour on a continuous basis, using performance signals to refine partner selection and improve overall channel efficiency.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Marketing, Business, Communications or a related discipline.
  • At least 3 years of experience in managing external partner or publisher channels within an online retail or consumer-focused business, ideally related to apparel, lifestyle, or adjacent categories.
  • Practical exposure to partner tracking or payout systems (e.g. Impact, Awin, ShareASale, CJ Affiliate), with the ability to navigate reporting, partner setup, and performance review.
  • Commercially aware and analytically inclined, able to interpret sales trends and partner behaviour to support revenue growth and channel optimisation.

If you are keen to apply for the position, kindly email your detailed resume in MS Word to hr@recruit-expert.com

Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

For more job opportunities, please visit our website at www.recruit-expert.com

EA Licence: 19C9701

Registration: R1326740
